---
title: "Architectural patterns"
verify: none # no executable cells
---

::: {.notes}
This notebook covers common architectural patterns for web (and not only) applications.

In this context architectural patterns refers to structure and limitations introduced on code structure and communication between modules.
:::

## Layered architecture

Key characteristics:
- Relations point inward moving 1 layer at the time.
- Upper layers depend of lower layers.

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    UI --> Application
    Application --> DA[Data Access]
```

***

Example project structure:

```text
MyApp/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.API/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Controllers/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProductsController.cs
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Program.cs
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.API.csproj           # References: MyApp.Application
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.Application/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Services/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ IProductService.cs
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProductService.cs
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ DTOs/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProductDto.cs
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.Application.csproj   # References: MyApp.DataAccess
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.DataAccess/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Repositories/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ IProductRepository.cs
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProductRepository.cs
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Entities/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Product.cs
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AppDbContext.cs
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.DataAccess.csproj    # References NuGets and/or other deps
в”‚
в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.sln
```

## Onion architecture

Key characteristics:
- Domain is at the very center.
- Dependencies point inward towards domain.

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    Framework --> Application
    Framework --> DA
    Framework --> Infrastructure
    Application --> Domain
    DA[DataAccess] --> Domain
    Infrastructure --> Domain
```

***

Example project structure:

```text
MyApp/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.API/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Controllers/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProductsController.cs
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Program.cs
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.API.csproj           # References: MyApp.Application, MyApp.Infrastructure
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.Application/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Services/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ IProductService.cs
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProductService.cs
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ DTOs/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProductDto.cs
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.Application.csproj   # References: MyApp.Domain
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.Infrastructure/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Repositories/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProductRepository.cs
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AppDbContext.cs
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.Infrastructure.csproj # References: MyApp.Domain
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.Domain/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Entities/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Product.cs
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Interfaces/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ IProductRepository.cs
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.Domain.csproj
в”‚
в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.sln
```

## Modular monolith

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    subgraph Module1
    A1[Application]
    D1[Domain]
    I1[Infrastructure]
    A1 --> D1
    I1 --> D1
    end
    
    subgraph Module2
    A2[Application]
    D2[Domain]
    I2[Infrastructure]
    A2 --> D2
    I2 --> D2
    end

    subgraph Module3
    A3[Application]
    D3[Domain]
    I3[Infrastructure]
    A3 --> D3
    I3 --> D3
    end

    Framework --> Module1
    Framework --> Module2
    Framework --> Module3
```

***

Example project structure:

```text
MyApp/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.API/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Program.cs
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.API.csproj
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Modules/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Products/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Products.Infrastructure/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Endpoints/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProductEndpoints.cs
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Repositories/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProductRepository.cs
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Products.Infrastructure.csproj # References Application
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Products.Application/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Services/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ IProductService.cs
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProductService.cs
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Products.Application.csproj
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Products.Domain/
в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Entities/
в”‚   в”‚       в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Product.cs
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ Products.Domain.csproj
в”‚   в”‚
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Orders/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Orders.Infrastructure/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Endpoints/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ OrderEndpoints.cs
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Orders.Infrastructure.csproj
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Orders.Application/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Orders.Application.csproj
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Orders.Domain/
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ Orders.Domain.csproj
в”‚   в”‚
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Customers/
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Customers.Infrastructure/
в”‚       в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Endpoints/
в”‚       в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ CustomerEndpoints.cs
в”‚       в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Customers.Infrastructure.csproj
в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Customers.Application/
в”‚       в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Customers.Application.csproj
в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ Customers.Domain/
в”‚           в””в”Ђв”Ђ Customers.Domain.csproj
в”‚
в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.sln
```

***

Key characteristics:
- Single monolithic application consisting on many layered modules.
- Each module has all the layers needed to serve that module.
- Central orchestrator/framework module bootstraps all individual layered modules.

References:
- https://github.com/kgrzybek/modular-monolith-with-ddd

## Clean architecture

Example project structure:

```text
MyApp/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.API/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Controllers/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProductsController.cs
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Program.cs
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.API.csproj
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.Infrastructure/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Persistence/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ AppDbContext.cs
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProductRepository.cs
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Services/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ DateTimeService.cs
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.Infrastructure.csproj
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.Application/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Common/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Interfaces/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ IProductRepository.cs
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ IDateTimeService.cs
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Behaviors/
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ ValidationBehavior.cs
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Products/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Commands/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ CreateProduct/
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ CreateProductCommand.cs
в”‚   в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ CreateProductCommandHandler.cs
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Queries/
в”‚   в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ GetProducts/
в”‚   в”‚           в”њв”Ђв”Ђ GetProductsQuery.cs
в”‚   в”‚           в””в”Ђв”Ђ GetProductsQueryHandler.cs
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.Application.csproj
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.Domain/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Entities/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ Product.cs
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Events/
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ProductCreatedEvent.cs
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.Domain.csproj
в”‚
в””в”Ђв”Ђ MyApp.sln
```

***

References:
- https://github.com/jasontaylordev/CleanArchitecture
- https://github.com/ardalis/CleanArchitecture
- https://blog.cleancoder.com/uncle-bob/2011/11/22/Clean-Architecture.html

## Other

References:
- Hexagonal architecture: https://alistair.cockburn.us/hexagonal-architecture
